purpose: Explain RTLE importance, program stakes, local problem of lacking validated early-warning indicators.
source_basis: Stage 00 research brief; Stage 07 refined problem statement; Hidayah2020 for policy context
required_inputs: Local program performance benchmarks, cohort years (To be confirmed).
caution_notes: Do not make causal claims; mark institutional scope.

purpose: Synthesize direct RT and radiography evidence that pre-board/mock exams can predict licensure, and note mixed findings and measurement caveats.
required_inputs: Full citations and access to these papers (available in metadata).
caution_notes: Flag measurement gaps and single-site limitations.

purpose: Describe item-level checks, correction-for-guessing, and reliability considerations for pre-board instruments.
caution_notes: Recommend performing these checks before using pre-board scores as predictors.

purpose: Specify institutional records to be linked (GWA, course grades, pre-board, internship, PRC outcomes) and data governance.
source_basis: Stage 00 data sources and Stage 07 gap analysis
required_inputs: Confirmation of availability of each dataset and PRC linkage permissions (To be confirmed).
caution_notes: PRC linkage may require approvals; document de-identification procedures.

purpose: Document planned item analyses, reliability checks, correction-for-guessing, and construction of adjusted pre-board scores.
caution_notes: If item data absent, report limitation and model using raw scores with sensitivity caveats.

purpose: Table: N included, cohort-year distribution, retaker status, basic demographics (if available).
source_basis: Planned outputs per Stage 00 and Stage 06
required_inputs: Raw administrative dataset linking records (blocked until provided).
caution_notes: Must match de-identified records and documented inclusion/exclusion.

purpose: Present item statistics and reliability, and produce adjusted pre-board score summary.
caution_notes: If unavailable, explicitly report limitation and show sensitivity analyses.

purpose: Report correlation matrices and regression/classification model outputs and incremental-value tests.
source_basis: Stage 00 intended analyses and Stage 06 synthesis examples (Rabinoa2025, Garcia2026).
required_inputs: Processed analytical dataset and model outputs (blocked).
caution_notes: Include cross-validated metrics if sample allows to avoid overfitting.

purpose: Translate results into institutional remediation guidance and measurement improvement steps.
source_basis: Stage 06 and Stage 07 recommendations and relevant programmatic proposals (Rabinoa2025; Gallardo2025).
required_inputs: Actual model performance metrics to justify recommendations (To be confirmed).
caution_notes: Frame recommendations as conditional and propose prospective evaluation designs.
